name: Generate Biomedicines, Inc.
business: The company is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing protein therapeutics using its Generate Platform, with no products approved for commercial sale. It has invested substantially all resources in researching and developing programs and product candidates, including GB-0895 for severe asthma and COPD, and GB-4362 and GB-5267. The company has collaboration agreements with Amgen and Novartis for certain programs.
namedCustomers: The University of Texas M.D. Anderson Cancer Center

exposures.sentence: We have focused substantially all of our efforts and financial resources on developing our Generate Platform and researching and developing programs and product candidates.
